reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Tiene un parque con juegos para chicos lindisimo y se puede comer afuera!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It has a lovely children's playground and you can eat outside!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdDhIMVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Es algo intermedio para llegar a destino y desayunar

(Translated by Google)
It's a stop along the way to reach your destination and have breakfast.

Good service.

reviews.comment:
Ubicación (a 1/2 camino e/CABA y M. Plata). Venta de Combustible y Servicios Sanitarios muy higiénicos.

(Translated by Google)
Location (halfway between CABA and M. Plata). Fuel sales and very hygienic restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3a01tVDhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
atienden bien y tiene todo lo que necesita el viajero

(Translated by Google)
They provide good service and have everything a traveler needs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNjl5WW1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros ofrecen buena atención, la entrada por ruta debería estar más señalizada para las noches de niebla o lluvia, se podría reforzar la limpieza en el store y café, los baños limpios y en buen estado.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants offer good service, the entrance by road should be better signposted for foggy or rainy nights, the cleaning in the store and cafe could be reinforced, the bathrooms are clean and in good condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnd09LS3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de lo que es la estación de servicio muy bueno . Lo que es la parrilla del lugar deja mucho que desear caro y la calidad no es la mejor.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station itself is very good. However, the grill there leaves much to be desired; it's expensive and the quality isn't the best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbHByN3hRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo. Amabilidad

(Translated by Google)
Very nice. Kindness
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBLTQzekxREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, juegos de plaza para los niños junto a mesas protegidas por cercos transparentes antiviento, baños limpios, disponibles papel, toallitas y jabón.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, playground equipment for children next to tables protected by transparent windproof fences, clean bathrooms, available paper, wipes and soap.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnZzVudTlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar tradicional para parar camino a la costa. Le faltan surtidores. En temporada se satura muy rápido

(Translated by Google)
It's a traditional stop on the way to the coast. It needs more gas pumps. It gets very crowded during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3c0tQcEhnEAE
